title: ovieda cubensis
intro: Ovieda cubensis, also known as Psilocybe cubensis, is a species of psychoactive mushroom that belongs to the Psilocybe genus. It contains psilocybin and psilocin, which are responsible for its hallucinogenic properties. The medicinal properties of Psilocybe cubensis include its potential to treat depression, anxiety, and addiction, as well as its ability to stimulate creativity and improve mood. Herbal preparations of Psilocybe cubensis include dried mushroom capsules, tea infusions, and spore prints, which can be used to create various medicinal products, although its use is strictly regulated in many countries.
